'''''The Ultimate Star Wars: Episode I Sticker Book''''' is an 8-page book filled with four additional pages of stickers of heroes, villains, [[Starship/Legends|spacecraft]], [[:Category:Vehicles|vehicles]], [[Droid/Legends|droids]], and [[equipment]] from [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. It was originally published by [[Dorling Kindersley|DK]] in [[1999]] and additionally offered as part of the ''Star Wars Episode I: Limited Edition Gift Pack''.

==Publisher's summary==
''Learn about ''Star Wars:'' Episode I with this fun and informative sticker book.''

''Choose the stickers to create your own book of ''Star Wars:'' Episode I.''

''Easy-peel stickers can be used more than once.''
